common.name: Name
common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

landing.headline: Secure your wealth with confidence
landing.subheadline: The ultimate platform for managing your multi-currency wallets and team members securely.

login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Please enter your new password below

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

twoFactor.authCodeDescription: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.
twoFactor.recoveryCodeDescription: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.description: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verifyEmail.verificationFailed: Verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.
verifyEmail.resendLink: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
verifyEmail.resendFailed: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.

invitation.title: Activate Your Account
invitation.invalidMessage: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used. Please contact your administrator.
invitation.setPasswordMessage: Hello! Please set a password for your account {email}.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noWallets: No wallets found. Create one to get started.
dashboard.missingThresholds: No transaction approval thresholds are configured. All transfers will be auto-approved.

wallets.title: Wallets
wallets.managementDescription: Manage the status or permanently delete this wallet.
wallets.cannotDeleteInfo: Only wallets with no transaction history can be deleted.
wallets.confirmFreeze: Are you sure you want to freeze the wallet "{name}"?
wallets.confirmUnfreeze: Are you sure you want to unfreeze the wallet "{name}"?
wallets.confirmDelete: Warning: You are about to permanently delete the wallet "{name}". This action cannot be undone.
wallets.confirmDeleteEdit: Warning: You are about to permanently delete the wallet "{name}". This action cannot be undone. Only empty wallets can be deleted.
wallets.deleteUnauthorized: You are not authorized to delete this wallet.
wallets.deleteUnauthorizedEdit: You are not authorized to delete this wallet (it might not be empty).

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Please explain why this transaction is being rejected...
transactions.confirmApprove: Are you sure you want to approve this transaction?

teamMembers.title: Team Members
teamMembers.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
teamMembers.confirmPromote: Are you sure you want to promote {name} to Manager? They will be able to view all wallets.
teamMembers.confirmDemote: Are you sure you want to demote {name} to Member? They will lose access to wallets they are not assigned to.

profile.title: Profile information
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.pendingEmail: A verification link has been sent to {email}. Please verify to update your email.
profile.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all of its data.
profile.deleteAccountDialogMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account? Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

password.title: Update password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.enableDescription: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login.
twoFactor.setupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and enter the code below to confirm.
twoFactor.enabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is enabled. You can manage your recovery codes below.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Manage your notification and formatting preferences
preferences.notificationsDescription: Choose which email notifications you'd like to receive
preferences.formattingDescription: Configure how dates and numbers are displayed
preferences.confirmLimitChangeDescription: Changing your daily transaction limit requires identity verification. Please enter your password or authentication code.
preferences.securityThresholdHint: Transfers above this amount require identity verification. Must be lower than the daily limit.

thresholds.title: Transaction Thresholds
thresholds.description: Configure approval thresholds per currency. Transactions above these amounts will require admin approval.
thresholds.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the approval threshold for {currency}?

deleteUser.title: Delete Account
deleteUser.description: Permanently delete your account. Any data you have in SecureWallet will be lost forever.
deleteUser.dialogMessage: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

confirmDialog.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to proceed?
confirmDialog.verificationHint: Please enter the code above to confirm this action.

transfers.title: Initiate Transfer
transfers.notesPlaceholder: Explain why this transfer is needed...
transfers.thresholdWarning: Transfers exceeding {amount} require Manager approval. Funds will be held in a pending state until reviewed.
transfers.thresholdAutoApproved: This transfer exceeds {amount}, but will be auto-approved due to your role.

errors.forbidden: You are not authorized to perform this transfer. The wallet may be frozen.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

validation.positiveAmount: Amount must be greater than zero

addressBook.title: Address Book
addressBook.selectOrAdd: Select from address book or add new
addressBook.name: Contact Name
addressBook.duplicateAddress: This address is already in your address book
addressBook.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this address book entry?

identityConfirm.title: Identity Verification
identityConfirm.description: This action requires identity verification. Please enter your password or authentication code.
